summary: Solid show highlighted by Brent's keyboards on Just a Little Light; recording quality not discussed but presumed acceptable.
review: The reviewer rates the performance as solid throughout, noting Brent Mydland’s keyboard work and his vocal on “Just a Little Light” as a highlight. Although there are no specific comments about the audio source or fidelity, the overall tone of the review is positive with a four‑star rating.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review; it praises the musical performance and gives 4 stars, while offering no insight on recording quality, leading to a solid but cautious rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not mention any sound issues or source type; no specific comments on clarity or mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a solid performance throughout, though the reviewer provides few details beyond a couple of song highlights.
